name: plataforma-preparacion-academica
description: Plataforma web de preparación académica (Álgebra y Cálculo / Aritmética y Estadística)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run start --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.render-build: npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate --schema=server/prisma/schema.production.prisma && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
